findings.description: S3 bucket 'acme-ecommerce-media-prod' has bucket policy allowing s3:GetObject to Principal '*'. Customer-uploaded images accessible to internet.
findings.remediation: Remove public access policy. Use CloudFront signed URLs for media delivery.

findings.description: Payment service ECS task role has 'iam:*' permissions. Violates least privilege for PCI-scoped service.
findings.remediation: Restrict to only required actions: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue, kms:Decrypt, rds:DescribeDBInstances

findings.description: RDS PostgreSQL instance 'acme-orders-prod' does not have encryption at rest enabled. Contains PCI cardholder data environment records.
findings.remediation: Enable encryption at rest using KMS CMK. Requires database migration (snapshot → restore with encryption).

findings.description: ElastiCache Redis cluster has AUTH token disabled. Any client within VPC can connect and read/write session data.
findings.remediation: Enable AUTH token and in-transit encryption. Rotate AUTH token stored in Secrets Manager.

findings.description: Payment service container runs as root user. Container escape vulnerability (CVE-2024-21626) has higher impact when running as root.
findings.remediation: Add 'user': '1000:1000' to container definition. Ensure application runs as non-root user.

findings.description: CloudWatch log group for payment service is not encrypted with CMK. Payment processing logs may contain cardholder data fragments.
findings.remediation: Associate KMS CMK with log group via aws logs associate-kms-key.

findings.description: Security group allows inbound SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0. Provides direct shell access from internet to VPC instances.
findings.remediation: Restrict SSH access to VPN CIDR range or use SSM Session Manager for shell access.

findings.description: Lambda function 'acme-fraud-detector' has resource-based policy allowing invocation from any AWS account. Should be restricted to EventBridge.
findings.remediation: Update resource policy to restrict principal to events.amazonaws.com with source account condition.

findings.description: Order documents S3 bucket does not have versioning enabled. Accidental deletion or overwrite of compliance-relevant documents is unrecoverable.
findings.remediation: Enable S3 versioning and configure lifecycle policy for version retention.

findings.description: KMS CMK used for PCI data encryption does not have automatic key rotation enabled. PCI-DSS requires annual crypto key rotation.
findings.remediation: Enable automatic key rotation: aws kms enable-key-rotation --key-id <key-id>
